stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding geostrophic wind?

options.a: It blows parallel to straight equidistant isobars.
options.b: It blows parallel to curved isobars.
options.c: It blows across the isobars from high to low pressure.
options.d: It is the wind resulting from the vector sum of gradient wind and surface wind, such that the geostrophic wind normally blows at an angle of 20-45 degrees relative to the isobars.
